theme: dwarves widening an aquifer for a city
title: Cistern Roots: Carving a Branching Aquifer Collector
strategies: straight 1-wide shaft above the cistern (baseline, ratio ~0.1)
widen the single best-permeability column band into a solid corridor with the whole budget (obvious 'more width = more flow')
spread many thin tributary fingers across the aquifer, gathered by one header row into a single trunk down to the cistern (branching collector)
